creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks to commit https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=1edae4eb8224297bab51fe268a02b97d448082f2 by vvd@ this should be solved now.

We have to wait some time before builders create the missing packages on quarterly.

Thanks again for the report and for your investigation. I will close this PR now :)
